title: Ramekin Greek Fluffy Horiatiki Jjim
description: A comforting, buttery, and fluffy Greek dish featuring tender streaky bacon, perfect for a satisfying dinner. This recipe adapts the classic Greek salad concept to a small, individual ramekin size.

ingredients.name: Streaky bacon
ingredients.notes: Choose a thick-cut, smoked bacon for added flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh parsley adds a nice texture and freshness.

ingredients.name: Extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality olive oil for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Add salt to taste, as needed.

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Add black pepper to taste, as needed.

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt and a pinch of salt. Set aside.
Cut the streaky bacon into small pieces and cook in a pan over medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a separate bowl, crumble the feta cheese and mix with chopped parsley.

In the ramekin, create a layer of cooked bacon. Top with a layer of Greek yogurt mixture, followed by a layer of crumbled feta cheese and parsley mixture. Repeat this process two more times, finishing with a layer of bacon on top.
Drizzle the top layer of bacon with a little olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Arrange the ramekins on a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and slightly puffed.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
